title: perrottetia multiflora
intro: Perrottetia multiflora is a species of flowering plant in the family Perrottetiaceae, native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, infections, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Perrottetia multiflora include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and soothe digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Perrottetia multiflora can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
